title: The Account of the Affair of al-Harith and Nagr after al-Harith Came to See Him
description: The Account of the Affair of al-Harith and Nagr after al-Harith Came to See Him. Recorded under the year 126 AH (744–745 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 26.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 26
